name: Moon
text: Stage ten... so this is where Sunrise kept leading me.
The Memory Cores fell silent. No more decoys answered from the tide.

name: Selkie
text: You always make it sound like I was the one running.

name: Moon
text: You left before I could ask you to stay.

name: Selkie
text: And you turned every apology into another battlefield.

name: Moon
text: I thought if Sunset reached you, I could undo the night I made.

name: Selkie
text: You cannot undo it. You can only choose what follows.

name: Moon
text: Then I choose to stop letting the sea decide for us.

name: Selkie
text: Good. Sunrise will not move aside for words alone.

name: Moon
text: Then let this be the last time we confuse chasing with leaving.
